content: TP-182 remains genuinely blocked in Step 1. I re-verified the execution checkout and local git history: this lane worktree is not sparse, and local refs/`main` also do not contain the prompt-target implementation files (`dashboard/server.cjs`, `dashboard/public/*`, `extensions/taskplane/*`, `extensions/tests/loader.mjs`, `package.json`). Commands logged in STATUS.md include `git sparse-checkout list`, `git ls-tree --name-only main`, `git cat-file -e main:dashboard/server.cjs`, and `git rev-list --all -- dashboard/server.cjs extensions/taskplane/discovery.ts`, all confirming there is nothing restorable from this repo snapshot. I updated STATUS.md with the stronger blocker details. To proceed, I need a restaged checkout/branch whose git history actually includes the dashboard/extensions sources referenced by the prompt.
